thesis_hint: Recent quality is improving on the strongest active branch (VVV funding snapback QScore 0.0900 -> 0.3182 -> 0.5323), so use this cycle to explore a fresh TAO 4h idea around persistent negative funding plus transitional-strength continuation. Design a TAO long-bias setup that only activates when funding is materially negative and price reclaims trend structure after a pullback; avoid pure mean-reversion and avoid low-trade ultra-strict filters.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with >= 18 trades and max_drawdown_pct <= 6.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 1.08, or dominant trending regime profit_factor < 1.0.
